title: malaxis gibbsiae
intro: Malaxis gibbsiae, also known as the Yellow Orchid, is a species of orchid native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Malaxis gibbsiae include treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Malaxis gibbsiae can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
